$comment: Auto-merge policy for the coding lane (operator decision 2026-07-17: PR review is no longer human-gated for routine changes). Consumed by scripts/auto-merge-pr.py, which dwight-launch-from-issue.py invokes after opening a PR. A PR auto-merges only if it passes deterministic gates AND touches no protected path AND stays under the size caps; otherwise it holds in in_review and pages Aaron with the reason. Protected paths are the blast-radius set: trading risk/execution logic, live config, credentials, schema migrations, and the merge machinery itself (agents must never be able to auto-merge changes to the thing that decides auto-merges).
